name: Viennese Cookies - Gwhp32a
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Chop pecans.
3. Add flour and chocolate chips to the pecans.
4. Grate lemon rind ingredients in a mixer or processor.
5. Pour into flour mix and mix together well.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake 6 to 8 minutes until lightly browned.
